languages.text: Губернатор Заркова Янур Батошки никогда не сложил с себя полномочия губернатора, распробовав вкус власти. До конца жизни он правил миром железной рукой, а любого претендента на свое место заставлял захлебнуться собственной кровью.

The governor of Zarkov, Janur Batoshski, never stepped down once given his first taste of power. For the rest of his life, he ruled the world with an iron hand, and made any challenger to his position choke on their own blood.
languages.original_text: Губернатор Заркова Янур Батошки никогда не сложил с себя полномочия губернатора, распробовав вкус власти. До конца жизни он правил миром железной рукой, а любого претендента на свое место заставлял захлебнуться собственной кровью.

traits.locale_text: The governor of Zarkov, Janur Batoshski, never stepped down once given his first taste of power. For the rest of his life, he ruled the world with an iron hand, and made any challenger to his position choke on their own blood.

The governor of Zarkov, Janur Batoshski, never stepped down once given his first taste of power. For the rest of his life, he ruled the world with an iron hand, and made any challenger to his position choke on their own blood.

The governor of Zarkov, Janur Batoshski, never stepped down once given his first taste of power. For the rest of his life, he ruled the world with an iron hand, and made any challenger to his position choke on their own blood.

languages.text: ザルコフの総督ジャンヌル・バトシュスキーは、権力を初めて味わった時、一度も辞任しなかった。残りの人生は、鉄の腕で世界を支配し、自分の地位に挑戦する者は、自分の血を飲み込むようにした。
languages.original_text: The governor of Zarkov, Janur Batoshski, never stepped down once given his first taste of power. For the rest of his life, he ruled the world with an iron hand, and made any challenger to his position choke on their own blood.

traits.locale_text: ザルコフの総督ジャンヌル・バトシュスキーは、権力を初めて味わった時、一度も辞任しなかった。残りの人生は、鉄の腕で世界を支配し、自分の地位に挑戦する者は、自分の血を飲み込むようにした。

languages.text: 扎尔科夫的总督雅努尔·巴托什斯基，一旦尝到权力的滋味便再也不肯放手。他铁腕统治了扎尔科夫一辈子，任何胆敢觊觎他位置的人，全都血溅当场。
languages.original_text: The governor of Zarkov, Janur Batoshski, never stepped down once given his first taste of power. For the rest of his life, he ruled the world with an iron hand, and made any challenger to his position choke on their own blood.

traits.locale_text: 扎尔科夫的总督雅努尔·巴托什斯基，一旦尝到权力的滋味便再也不肯放手。他铁腕统治了扎尔科夫一辈子，任何胆敢觊觎他位置的人，全都血溅当场。

languages.text: Après avoir goûté au pouvoir pour la première fois, Janur Batoshski ne quitta jamais son poste de gouverneur de Zarkov. Il dirigea la planète d'une main de fer jusqu'à la fin de ses jours, en versant le sang de quiconque convoitait sa place.
languages.original_text: The governor of Zarkov, Janur Batoshski, never stepped down once given his first taste of power. For the rest of his life, he ruled the world with an iron hand, and made any challenger to his position choke on their own blood.

traits.locale_text: Après avoir goûté au pouvoir pour la première fois, Janur Batoshski ne quitta jamais son poste de gouverneur de Zarkov. Il dirigea la planète d'une main de fer jusqu'à la fin de ses jours, en versant le sang de quiconque convoitait sa place.

languages.text: El gobernador de Zarkov, Janur Batoshski, nunca se alejó del poder desde que lo probó por primera vez. Dedicó el resto de su vida a controlar el planeta con mano de hierro y ahogó a sus opositores en su propia sangre.
languages.original_text: The governor of Zarkov, Janur Batoshski, never stepped down once given his first taste of power. For the rest of his life, he ruled the world with an iron hand, and made any challenger to his position choke on their own blood.

traits.locale_text: El gobernador de Zarkov, Janur Batoshski, nunca se alejó del poder desde que lo probó por primera vez. Dedicó el resto de su vida a controlar el planeta con mano de hierro y ahogó a sus opositores en su propia sangre.

languages.text: Zarkov Valisi Janur Batoshski, gücün tadını bir kez aldıktan sonra bir daha asla geri adım atmadı. Hayatının kalanında dünyayı demir bir yumrukla yönetti ve konumuna meydan okuyan herkesi kendi kanında boğdu.
languages.original_text: The governor of Zarkov, Janur Batoshski, never stepped down once given his first taste of power. For the rest of his life, he ruled the world with an iron hand, and made any challenger to his position choke on their own blood.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov Valisi Janur Batoshski, gücün tadını bir kez aldıktan sonra bir daha asla geri adım atmadı. Hayatının kalanında dünyayı demir bir yumrukla yönetti ve konumuna meydan okuyan herkesi kendi kanında boğdu.

languages.text: Janur Batoshski, der Gouverneur von Zarkov, wich nie mehr zurück, nachdem er von der Macht gekostet hatte. Er herrschte für den Rest seines Lebens mit eiserner Hand über den Planeten und ließ sämtliche Konkurrenten an ihrem eigenen Blut ersticken.
languages.original_text: The governor of Zarkov, Janur Batoshski, never stepped down once given his first taste of power. For the rest of his life, he ruled the world with an iron hand, and made any challenger to his position choke on their own blood.

traits.locale_text: Janur Batoshski, der Gouverneur von Zarkov, wich nie mehr zurück, nachdem er von der Macht gekostet hatte. Er herrschte für den Rest seines Lebens mit eiserner Hand über den Planeten und ließ sämtliche Konkurrenten an ihrem eigenen Blut ersticken.
